copy.value: Step into a land steeped in history and legend, explore our dramatic landscapes and uncover our ancient Celtic roots. Vast lochs, glens and Munros - easily accessible from our vibrant cities and towns - make Scotland the perfect place to lose yourself.

introduction.value:
Welcome to Scotland

Your Scottish adventure starts now. Delve into a land steeped in history and legend, explore our dramatic landscapes and uncover our ancient Celtic roots. Vast lochs, glens and munros - easily accessible from our vibrant cities and towns – make Scotland the perfect place to lose yourself.

From crashing waves on our rugged coastlines to live trad music in our local pubs, step away from the everyday and experience a true Scottish welcome.

Fàilte gu Alba!

Get all the information you need for your trip to Scotland! Book accommodation, discover new places to visit, find amazing things to do and more!

data.teaser: Where history meets breathtaking beauty, and every visit feels like an escape.
data.seoDescription: Get all the information you need for your trip to Scotland! Book accommodation, discover new places to visit, find amazing things to do and more!
data.title: Start Your Story in Scotland

introduction.value: Did we catch your eye during the 2026 World Cup? Or did you hear our lively Tartan Army first? It may have taken us 28 years to secure a win, but you don't need to wait that long to book a fantastic holiday to Scotland, with our breathtaking landscapes, unmissable events and friendly Scots.

data.name: content

copy.value: Venez découvrir une terre d’histoire et de légendes, explorez nos paysages spectaculaires et découvrez notre patrimoine celtique. De nos lochs, au sommet de nos munros en passant par nos villes, l’Écosse est une destination idéale pour s’évader et rêver.

introduction.value:
Votre aventure écossaise commence maintenant. Plongez dans un pays imprégné d’histoire et de légendes, perdez-vous dans nos paysages spectaculaires et découvrez nos racines celtiques. Les lochs, glens et munros accessibles depuis nos villes et villages font de l'Écosse l’endroit idéal pour se perdre en toutes saisons.

Des vagues déferlantes sur nos côtes escarpées aux airs de musique traditionnelle qui animent nos pubs, éloignez-vous du quotidien et faites place au véritable accueil écossais.

Fàilte gu Alba!

data.teaser: Où nature, histoire et évasion vous attendent à chaque détour.
data.seoTitle: VisitScotland : l’Office du tourisme national de l’Écosse
data.seoDescription: Obtenez toutes les informations essentielles pour organiser votre voyage en Écosse : hébergements, destinations, activités étonnantes !
data.title: Écrivez votre histoire en Écosse

data.name: content

copy.value: Tauchen Sie ein in ein Land voller Geschichte und Legenden, verlieren Sie sich in unseren dramatischen Landschaften und entdecken Sie unsere alten keltischen Wurzeln. Riesige Seen, Täler und Berge – gut erreichbar aus unseren Städten und Ortschaften – machen Schottland zum perfekten Ort für Ihre Auszeit.

introduction.value:
Ihr schottisches Abenteuer beginnt jetzt. Tauchen Sie ein in ein Land voller Geschichte und Legenden, verlieren Sie sich in unseren dramatischen Landschaften und entdecken Sie unsere alten keltischen Wurzeln. Riesige Seen, Täler und Berge – gut erreichbar aus unseren Städten und Ortschaften – machen Schottland zum perfekten Ort für Ihre Auszeit.

Von brechenden Wellen an unseren rauen Küsten bis hin zu traditioneller Livemusik in unseren Pubs, lassen Sie den Alltag hinter sich und genießen Sie die schottische Gastfreundschaft.

Fàilte gu Alba!

Finden Sie alles, was Sie für eine unvergessliche Zeit in Schottland brauchen.

data.teaser: Hier trifft Mythos auf atemberaubende Schönheit und jede Reise ist pure Erholung.
data.seoDescription: Finden Sie alle Informationen, die Sie für Ihre Schottlandreise brauchen. Buchen Sie Unterkünfte, entdecken Sie neue Orte, finden Sie Aktivitäten und mehr!
data.title: Schreiben Sie Ihre Geschichte in Schottland

data.name: content

copy.value: Duik in een land vol geschiedenis en legendes, verdwaal in onze indrukwekkende landschappen en ontdek onze oude Keltische roots. Enorme meren, valleien en bergen – makkelijk te bereiken vanuit onze steden en dorpen – maken Schotland de perfecte plek voor je vakantie.

introduction.value:
Je Schotse avontuur begint nu. Verdiep je in een land rijk aan geschiedenis en legendes, verlies jezelf in een van onze dramatische landschappen en ontdek onze oude keltische wortels. Uitgestrekte meren, valleien en bergen – makkelijk bereikbaar vanaf onze bruisende steden en dorpen – maken Schotland de perfecte plek voor je vakantie.

Van golven die op onze ruige kustlijn breken tot traditionele livemuziek in onze lokale pubs, laat het leven van alledag achter je en geniet van de Schotse gastvrijheid.

Fàilte gu Alba! 

Vind alle informatie die je nodig hebt voor je vakantie in Schotland. Boek accommodatie, ontdek nieuwe plekken, vind geweldige activiteiten en meer!

data.teaser: Waar geschiedenis en adembenemende schoonheid samenkomen en elke reis pure ontspanning is.
data.seoTitle: VisitScotland - de nationale toeristenbond van Schotland
data.seoDescription: Vind alle informatie die je nodig hebt voor je reis naar Schotland. Boek accommodatie, ontdek nieuwe plaatsen, vind activiteiten en meer.
data.title: Beleef jouw avontuur in Schotland

data.name: content

copy.value: Entra in una terra piena di storia e leggende, esplora i nostri paesaggi spettacolari e scopri le nostre antiche radici celtiche. Grandi laghi, vallate e Munros - facilmente raggiungibili dalle nostre vivaci città e paesi - rendono la Scozia il posto perfetto per perdersi.

introduction.value:
Benvenuto in Scozia

La tua avventura scozzese inizia ora. Immergiti in una terra ricca di storia e di leggende, perditi nei nostri paesaggi suggestivi e scopri le nostre antiche radici celtiche. Vasti laghi, valli e montagne, facilmente accessibili dalle nostre città e villaggi, rendono la Scozia il luogo perfetto per la tua vacanza.

Dalle onde che si infrangono sulle nostre coste frastagliate alla musica tradizionale dal vivo nei nostri pub, lascianti andare e goditi l'ospitalità scozzese.

Fàilte gu Alba!

Ottieni tutte le informazioni necessarie per il tuo viaggio in Scozia!

data.teaser: La tradizione incontra una bellezza mozzafiato e ogni viaggio è puro relax.
data.seoTitle: VisitScotland - L'ufficio del turismo nazionale della Scozia
data.seoDescription: Ottieni tutte le informazioni necessarie per il tuo viaggio in Scozia! Prenota un alloggio, scopri nuovi luoghi, trova cose incredibili da fare e molto altro!
data.title: Scrivi la tua storia in Scozia

data.name: content

copy.value: Adéntrate en una tierra repleta de historia y leyendas, admira nuestros espectaculares paisajes y descubre nuestras ancestrales raíces celtas. Extensos lochs «lagos», glens «valles» y munros «montañas», fácilmente accesibles desde nuestras vibrantes ciudades y pueblos, hacen de Escocia el lugar perfecto para visitar.

introduction.value:
Bienvenido a Escocia

Tu aventura escocesa comienza ahora. Adéntrate en una tierra repleta de historia y leyendas, admira nuestros espectaculares paisajes y descubre nuestras ancestrales raíces celtas. Extensos lochs «lagos», glens «valles» y munros «montañas», fácilmente accesibles desde nuestras vibrantes ciudades y pueblos, hacen de Escocia el lugar perfecto para visitar.

Desde las olas que rompen en nuestras escarpadas costas hasta la música tradicional en directo en nuestros pubs locales, aléjate de lo cotidiano y experimenta una auténtica bienvenida escocesa.

¡Fàilte gu Alba!

¡Consigue toda la información que necesitas para tu viaje a Escocia!

data.teaser: Donde la historia se fusiona con una belleza deslumbrante, haciendo de cada visita una experiencia inolvidable.
data.seoTitle: VisitScotland - Organización nacional de turismo de Escocia
data.seoDescription: ¡Obtén toda la información que necesitas para tu viaje a Escocia! ¡Reserva alojamiento, descubre nuevos lugares, encuentra cosas increíbles para hacer y más!
data.title: Comienza tu aventura en Escocia

data.name: content

introduction.value: You know the famous places already, but there is much more to discover in Scotland. Use our map of Scotland to explore different cities, towns and regions. It's time to uncover the hidden gems of Scotland, beyond the well-trodden paths. Every place holds a story waiting to be told...

data.name: content

introduction.value: Adventure, culture, time to unwind – Scotland delivers. From unforgettable family-friendly attractions to buzzing festivals and epic nature escapes, there’s no shortage of incredible and unique things to do, including the world’s only UNESCO Trail, thrilling mountain biking and action-packed watersports.

data.teaser: Discover a wealth of things to see & do in Scotland.
data.seoTitle: Things to See & Do in Scotland
data.seoDescription: Discover the fantastic range of things to see and do in Scotland. Including days out ideas, attractions, outdoor activities, nature spots, events and more.
data.title: Things to see & do in Scotland

data.name: content

copy.value: Accommodation in Scotland ranges from luxury high-end hotels, spa resorts and castle stays to more budget-friendly options including bed and breakfasts, guesthouses, cottages and hostels.

introduction.value: Looking for a place to stay but don’t know where to start? We’re here to answer your burning questions on accommodation in Scotland, from the best time to book and accommodation types to overall costs, we’ve got you covered.

data.teaser: Find out everything you need to know about our different accommodation types in Scotland.
data.seoDescription: Find accommodation in Scotland for your next trip. Including hotel, B&Bs and self-catering stays with information on the best time to book, prices and more.
data.title: Accommodation in Scotland

data.name: content

introduction.value: Let’s make your dream trip a reality. Find simple, practical information on travelling to Scotland and getting around once you’re here. You can also explore our weather and seasonal guides to help you decide what you’d like to experience, from lively summer events to spectacular autumn colours or festive Christmas markets. Got practical questions? Our FAQs, passport and safety pages cover everything you need, so nothing stands between you and your Scottish adventure.

introduction.value: Vous connaissez ses destinations les plus célèbres, mais l’Écosse recèle bien d’autres trésors. Utilisez notre carte interactive pour explorer nos différentes villes, villages, îles et régions. Il est temps de partir à la découverte des perles rares de l’Écosse, loin des sentiers battus. Chaque lieu recèle une histoire qui ne demande qu’à être racontée...

data.teaser: Utilisez notre carte pour explorer les villes, régions et comtés historiques d’Écosse.
data.seoTitle: Carte de l’Écosse : régions, villes et comtés historiques
data.seoDescription: Explorez les villes, régions et comtés historiques d’Écosse. ainsi que les temps de trajet depuis Londres, l’Europe et bien plus encore.
data.title: Les destinations d’Écosse

data.name: content

introduction.value:
Quelles sont les activités incroyables que vous voulez faire et les sites uniques que vous désirez visiter en Écosse ? 

Il y a un million de choses mémorables à faire, de l’Itinéraire UNESCO au monde aux domaines de VTT et aux sports nautiques sur des rivières aussi rapides que magnifiques. En Écosse, soyez sûrs de trouver des attractions, des activités et des événements de choix. Elle ne vous offrira pas seulement des souvenirs mémorables, mais également des moment à partager en famille ou entre amis.

data.teaser: Découvrez l’éventail d’activités et d’attractions en Écosse.
data.seoDescription: Découvrez l’éventail d’activités et d’attractions en Écosse, des châteaux aux menhirs en passant par les parcs nationaux, les musées et les distilleries.
data.title: Activités et attractions en Écosse

data.name: content

copy.value: En Écosse, vous avez le choix parmi des hôtels haut de gamme luxueux, des stations thermales et des séjours dans des châteaux ainsi que des options plus économiques, notamment des chambres et maisons d’hôtes, des cottages et des auberges.

introduction.value: Vous recherchez un hébergement en Écosse mais ne savez pas où chercher ? Nous sommes là pour répondre à toutes vos questions sur les hébergements en Écosse : quelle est la meilleure période pour réserver ? Quel type d’hébergement choisir ? Quels sont les coûts associés ? Nous avons les réponses à vos questions, et plus encore.

data.teaser: Trouvez l’hébergement idéal pour votre séjour en Écosse.
data.seoTitle: Hébergements en Écosse : planifiez votre séjour
data.seoDescription: Le guide le plus complet sur les hébergements en Écosse : choisissez parmi des hôtels, des chambres d’hôtes, des châteaux, des cottages et bien plus encore.
data.title: Les hébergements en Écosse

data.name: content

introduction.value:
Faisons de ce voyage extraordinaire une réalité. Voyagez en Écosse sans tracas en consultant nos infos simples et pratiques sur comment vous rendre en Écosse et explorer notre pays

Vous trouverez également tout ce que vous devez savoir sur la météo et les périodes d’affluence, afin de pouvoir rencontrer les animaux de la ferme au printemps, admirer les magnifiques couleurs de l'automne ou explorer nos marchés de Noël en hiver.

Vous avez d’autres questions ? Nos pages de FAQ, sur les passeport ou encore la sécurité en pleine nature couvrent tout ce dont vous avez besoin, pour que rien ne vienne perturber votre prochain voyage en Écosse !

data.teaser: Tout ce que vous devez savoir pour vous rendre en Écosse.
data.seoTitle: Infos pratiques sur les voyages en Écosse
data.seoDescription: Les infos essentielles sur les voyages et les vacances en Écosse : FAQ sur les passeports, la monnaie, la douane et bien plus encore.
data.title: Infos pratiques et conseils de voyage

introduction.value: Sie kennen die berühmtesten Orte vielleicht schon, aber es gibt in Schottland viel mehr zu entdecken. Nutzen Sie unsere Schottlandkarte, um Ihr perfektes Reiseziel zu finden und entdecken Sie unsere Regionen, Städte und Ortschaften.

data.teaser: Nutzen Sie unsere Karte um Schottlands Städte, Orte und Regionen zu entdecken. Finden Sie berühmte Reiseziele und neue Orte.
data.seoDescription: Nutzen Sie unsere Landkarte von Schottland mit Regionen, Städten, Sehenswürdigkeiten & den beliebtesten Reisezielen in den Highlands.
data.title: Städte, Regionen & Reiseziele in Schottland

data.name: content

introduction.value: Welche einmaligen und unglaublichen Dinge möchten Sie in Schottland unternehmen? Entspannen Sie sich in der atemberaubenden Natur oder feiern Sie mit Ihren Freunden bei einem neuen Festival. Sie können in Schottland unvergessliche Aktivitäten erleben, vom einzigen UNESCO Trail der Welt bis hin zu Mountainbiking und Wassersport.

data.teaser: Entdecken Sie fantastische Aktivitäten und Sehenswürdigkeiten für Ihren Urlaub in Schottland.
data.seoDescription: Fantastische Attraktionen und Sehenswürdigkeiten in Schottland: Entdecken Sie Burgen, Steinkreise, Nationalparks, Museen & Destillerien.
data.title: Aktivitäten & Sehenswürdigkeiten in Schottland

data.name: content

introduction.value: Sie suchen eine Unterkunft, wissen aber nicht, wo Sie anfangen sollen? Wir haben die Antworten auf Ihre Fragen zu Unterkünften in Schottland. Von der idealen Zeit für Buchungen über Arten von Unterkünften bis hin zu den Kosten, hier erfahren Sie, was Sie für Ihre Urlaubsplanung wissen müssen.

data.teaser: Finden Sie alle wichtigen Informationen über verschiedene Arten von Unterkünften in Schottland.
data.seoTitle: Unterkünfte in Schottland für Ferien & Übernachtungen
data.seoDescription: Finden Sie vielseitige Unterkünfte in Schottland. Von Hotels über Ferienhäuser bis hin zu B&Bs und mehr.
data.title: Unterkünfte in Schottland

data.name: content

introduction.value: Wir machen Ihren Traumurlaub wahr! Finden Sie nützliche Informationen zur Anreise nach Schottland und dem Reisen vor Ort. Außerdem erfahren Sie mehr über das Wetter und die beste Reisezeit, damit Sie entscheiden können, was Sie erleben möchten, von mitreißenden Sommerfestivals bis hin zu spektakulären Herbstfarben oder festlichen Weihnachtsmärkten. Sie möchten noch mehr wissen? Unsere Seiten zu häufig gestellten Fragen, Reisepässen und Sicherheit decken alles ab, was Sie brauchen, damit nichts mehr zwischen Ihnen und Ihrem Abenteuer in Schottland steht.

data.teaser: Unsere Informationen helfen Ihnen bei der Reiseplanung und verraten Ihnen mehr über die schottische Geschichte und Kultur.
data.seoDescription: Hier sind unsere Top-Tipps für Reisen nach Schottland. Mit Anreise und Nahverkehr, nachhaltigen Reisemöglichkeiten, nützlichen Hinweisen und mehr.
data.title: Top-Tipps für Ihre Schottlandreise

introduction.value: Je kent de bekende plekken al, maar er is nog veel meer te ontdekken in Schotland. Gebruik onze kaart van Schotland om verschillende steden, dorpen en regio's te verkennen. Het is tijd om de verborgen pareltjes van Schotland te ontdekken, ver weg van de gebaande paden.

data.teaser: Gebruik onze kaart om steden en regio's van Schotland te ontdekken. Vind beroemde bestemmingen en nieuwe plaatsen.
data.seoDescription: Ontdek vakantiebestemmingen en leuke plekken in Schotland. Met een kaart van Schotland, regio's, gebieden, inspiratie voor uitstapjes en nog veel meer.
data.title: Steden, regio's en bestemmingen in Schotland

data.name: content

introduction.value:
Welke unieke en geweldige dingen wil jij doen in Schotland?

Ontspan in de adembenemende natuur, vier feest met je vrienden op een nieuw festival of ontdek geweldige attracties voor het hele gezin. Je kunt in Schotland talloze onvergetelijke activiteiten ondernemen, van 's werelds enige UNESCO Trail tot spannende fietsparken en watersporten op wilde en prachtige rivieren.

data.teaser: Ontdek fantastische dingen om te zien en doen in Schotland.
data.seoDescription: Ontdek wat je allemaal kunt zien en doen in Schotland. Met ideeën voor dagjes uit, attracties, buitenactiviteiten, natuurgebieden, evenementen en nog veel meer.
data.title: Activiteiten & bezienswaardigheden in Schotland

data.name: content

copy.value: Accommodatie in Schotland varieert van luxe hotels, spa-resorts en kastelen tot wat goedkopere opties waaronder bed and breakfasts, pensions, huisjes en jeugdherbergen.

introduction.value: Ben je op zoek naar een plek om te overnachten maar weet je niet zo goed waar je moet beginnen? Wij zijn er om je vragen over accommodatie in Schotland te beantwoorden. Van de beste tijd om te boeken en soorten accommodatie tot kosten, hier vind je het antwoord.

data.teaser: Vind alles wat je moet weten over de verschillende soorten accommodaties in Schotland.
data.seoTitle: Accommodatie in Schotland - plan je verblijf
data.seoDescription: Vind allerlei soorten accommodaties in Schotland. Van hotels en exclusieve verblijven tot vakantiewoninen en B&B's.
data.title: Accommodatie in Schotland

data.name: content

introduction.value: Laten we je droomreis werkelijkheid maken. Vind handige, praktische informatie over reizen naar Schotland en hoe je daar rondreist. Bovendien lees je meer over ons weer en de beste reistijd om je te helpen beslissen wat je graag wilt zien, van gezellige zomerfestivals tot spectaculaire herfstkleuren of feestelijke kerstmarkten. Heb je praktische vragen? Onze pagina's met veelgestelde vragen, paspoortinformatie en veiligheid geven je alle info die je nodig hebt, zodat niets je nog in de weg staat om naar Schotland te reizen!

data.teaser: Onze handige info helpt je bij je reisplanning en vertelt je meer over de geschiedenis, cultuur, geografie, natuur en evenementen van Schotland.
data.seoTitle: De beste tips voor een reis naar Schotland
data.seoDescription: Hier zijn onze top tips voor reizen naar Schotland. Met reisinformatie, milieuvriendelijk reizen, praktische tips en meer.
data.title: De beste tips voor een reis naar Schotland

introduction.value: I luoghi più famosi li conosci già, ma c'è molto altro da scoprire in Scozia. Utilizza la nostra mappa della Scozia per esplorare diverse città, paesi e regioni. È il momento di scoprire le gemme nascoste della Scozia, al di là dei sentieri più battuti. Ogni luogo racchiude una storia che aspetta di essere raccontata...

data.teaser: Utilizza la nostra mappa per esplorare le città, i paesi e le regioni della Scozia.
data.seoTitle: Mappa della Scozia - regioni, città e destinazioni
data.seoDescription: Utilizza la nostra mappa per esplorare le città, le regioni e le contee della Scozia. Scopri le famose destinazioni scozzesi.
data.title: Luoghi da visitare

data.name: content

introduction.value: Quali sono le cose uniche e incredibili da vedere e da fare in Scozia?  Lascia che i bambini imparino nuove storie in attrazioni incredibili, porta i tuoi amici a un nuovo festival o passa un po' di tempo a rilassarti in luoghi naturali mozzafiato. Ci sono un milione di cose memorabili da fare, dall'unico sentiero UNESCO del mondo agli esilaranti bike park e agli sport acquatici.

data.teaser: Scopri un'infinità di cose da fare e da vedere in Scozia.
data.seoTitle: Cose da vedere e da fare in Scozia
data.seoDescription: Scopri cosa vedere e fare in Scozia: le migliori attrazioni, gli eventi, le attività all'aperto, e la cucina scozzese.
data.title: Cose da vedere e da fare in Scozia

data.name: content

copy.value: Le possibilità di alloggio in Scozia spaziano da hotel di lusso, resort termali e soggiorni in castelli a opzioni più economiche, tra cui bed and breakfast, guest house, cottage e ostelli.

introduction.value: Stai cercando un posto dove soggiornare ma non sai da dove cominciare? Siamo qui per rispondere alle tue domande più urgenti sugli alloggi in Scozia: dal momento migliore per prenotare ai tipi di alloggio, fino ai costi complessivi, abbiamo tutte le risposte all tue domande.

data.teaser: Scopri tutto quello che c'è da sapere sulle nostre diverse tipologie di alloggio in Scozia.
data.seoDescription: Scopri alloggi in Scozia per il tuo prossimo viaggio. Tra cui hotel, B&B e alloggi con cucina, con informazioni sul periodo migliore per prenotare e sui prezzi.
data.title: Alloggi in Scozia

data.name: content

introduction.value: Trova semplici informazioni su come raggiungere la Scozia e viaggiare a livello locale. Abbiamo anche informazioni utili sul meteo e sul periodo migliore per viaggiare, così potrai visitare gli animali della fattoria in primavera, ammirare i ricchi colori autunnali o esplorare i nostri mercatini di Natale. Hai domande pratiche? Le nostre domande frequenti, informazioni sui passaporti e le pagine sulla sicurezza coprono tutto ciò di cui hai bisogno per garantire che nulla si frapponga tra te e la Scozia!

data.teaser: Le nostre informazioni possono aiutarti a pianificare e a conoscere meglio la storia, la cultura e molto altro della Scozia.
data.seoTitle: Informazioni sulla Scozia - curiosità e info di viaggio
data.seoDescription: Hai in programma un viaggio in Scozia? Le nostre informazioni possono aiutarti a pianificare e a conoscere meglio la Scozia.
data.title: Tutto quello che c'è da sapere per il tuo viaggio in Scozia

introduction.value: Es posible que ya conozcas los lugares más famosos de Escocia, pero hay muchísimo más por descubrir. Utiliza nuestro mapa de Escocia para encontrar tu destino perfecto y explorar nuestras regiones, ciudades y pueblos. Es el momento de descubrir las joyas ocultas de Escocia, más allá de los caminos más transitados. Cada lugar tiene una historia que contar...

data.teaser: Utiliza nuestro mapa para explorar las ciudades, los pueblos y las regiones de Escocia. Descubre destinos escoceses famosos y conoce nuevos lugares.
data.seoTitle: Los destinos en Escocia - Regiones e inspiración
data.seoDescription: Descubre los destinos de Escocia y obtén ideas para tus próximas vacaciones. Incluye un mapa de Escocia, lugares populares y destinos no tan conocidos.
data.title: Los destinos en Escocia

data.name: content

introduction.value: Aventura, cultura, tiempo para relajarte: ¡Escocia lo tiene todo! Deja que los niños aprendan nuevas historias en atracciones increíbles, lleva a tus amigos a un festival nuevo o pasa un tiempo relajándote en lugares naturales impresionantes. Hay un millón de cosas memorables que hacer, desde la única  ruta del mundo de la UNESCO hasta emocionantes rutas ciclistas y deportes acuáticos.

data.teaser: Descubre una gran cantidad de cosas que ver y hacer en Escocia.
data.seoTitle: Cosas que ver y hacer en Escocia
data.seoDescription: Descubre la fantástica variedad de cosas para ver y hacer en Escocia como escapadas, atracciones, actividades al aire libre,  naturaleza, eventos y mucho más.
data.title: Cosas que ver y hacer en Escocia

data.name: content

copy.value: En Escocia encontrarás una gran variedad de opciones, desde lujosos hoteles, resorts con spa y estancias en castillos históricos, hasta alternativas más económicas como bed & breakfasts, pensiones, casas rurales y hostales.

introduction.value: ¿Buscas un lugar donde alojarte pero no sabes por dónde empezar? Estamos aquí para responder a tus preguntas sobre el alojamiento en Escocia. Desde la mejor época para reservar y los distintos tipos de alojamiento hasta los precios. Aquí encontrarás todo lo que necesitas saber para planificar tus vacaciones.

data.teaser: Descubre todo lo que necesitas saber sobre los diferentes tipos de alojamiento en Escocia.
data.seoDescription: Encuentra alojamiento en Escocia para tu próximo viaje. Desde hoteles, alojamiento vacacional y B&Bs, hasta la mejor época para reservar, precios y mucho más..
data.title: El alojamiento en Escocia

data.name: content

introduction.value: ¡Haz realidad el viaje de tus sueños! Encuentra información práctica y consejos de viaje sobre cómo llegar a Escocia y explorar nuestro país. También encontrarás todo lo que necesitas saber sobre el clima2 y la mejor época para viajar, para poder disfrutar de la observación de animales de granja en primavera, admirar los preciosos colores otoñales o explorar los mercados navideños. ¿Tienes alguna otra pregunta? También puedes consultar nuestra sección de preguntas frecuentes, donde encontrarás información sobre pasaportes, seguridad y todo lo que necesitas saber para sacar el máximo partido a tu viaje a Escocia.

data.teaser: Nuestra información puede ayudarte a planificar tu viaje, conocer mejor la historia, el arte y la cultura, la fauna y los eventos del país.
data.seoTitle: Consejos útiles para tu viaje a Escocia
data.seoDescription: Aquí tienes nuestros mejores consejos para viajar a Escocia. Cómo llegar y moverte por Escocia, como viajar de forma responsable, consejos prácticos y más.
data.title: Consejos útiles para tu viaje a Escocia

introduction.value: Highland games are where ancient contests of strength, endurance and speed meet music and dance in a vibrant celebration of Scottish culture and community. Held in towns and villages across Scotland from late spring to early autumn, each games has its own character, traditions and warm welcome.

data.teaser: From the tug o' war to the caber toss, Scotland's Highland games are not to be missed.
data.seoDescription: Find information about the highland games in Scotland. Including history of the highland games, what the games are, upcoming events, and more.
data.title: Highland games in Scotland

data.name: content

copy.value: Enjoy a breathtaking mix of enchanting woodlands, wonderful wildlife and dramatic landscapes which feel timeless and unforgettable.

introduction.value:
The Northern Lights in Scotland are often referred to as the Aurora Borealis. Over autumn and winter, the night sky delivers a theatrical performance where you'll be treated to glowing ribbons of light reflecting off our lochs, mountains and rugged coastlines making the moment feel calm and magical.

Thanks to our high northern latitude, vast dark and unpolluted skies, and frequent solar activity, Scotland is one of the most reliable places to witness this unforgettable experience.

data.teaser: Nature's most dramatic winter light display. Discover more about this otherworldly natural phenomenon.
data.seoDescription: Enjoy the breathtaking Northern Lights in Scotland. Including information on when is the best time to see them, FAQs and more.
data.title: The Northern Lights in Scotland

data.name: content

introduction.value: People often ask us for our ultimate list of Scotland's most beautiful and historic towns. Honestly, it's difficult to narrow it down – Scotland has so many towns steeped in a rich past and full of hidden gems. It's a tough choice to make, but here is a helpful list of Scotland’s finest towns, each brimming with history and charm.

data.teaser: Get ready to take a journey through some of the finest historic towns in Scotland.
data.seoDescription: Discover our 12 must-visit historic towns to visit in Scotland. Including Dunkeld, Arbroath, Pittenweem, Fort Augustus, Wigtown, Inveraray and more.
data.title: 12 Must-visit historic towns in Scotland

data.name: content

introduction.value: Whisky is Scotland's national drink and our biggest export, enjoyed across the globe as well as right here in Scotland. Skilled distillers transform barley and water into a precious spirit, which is tucked away across our landscapes to mature. Tap into your senses as you head on a distillery tour, soak in the colours, smells, and tastes of a variety of blends, and learn more about the whisky making process.

data.teaser: Whisky is Scotland's best known export and has been proudly produced throughout the country for hundreds of years.
data.seoDescription: Find information about Scottish whisky, Scotland's national drink. Learn whisky facts, what's new in the world of whisky, trails, and tours, and more.
data.title: Scottish whisky

data.name: content

introduction.value: The Commonwealth Games is back for another stint, from 23 July – 2 August 2026, this time in Glasgow, Scotland's largest city. Held every four years, this multi-sport event welcomes athletes from across the Commonwealth of Nations to compete for medals while celebrating our rich sporting culture. This summer, be part of the sporting action and plan a city break to Glasgow with lots of things to do and if you have time, the opportunity to explore further afield.

data.teaser: The countdown is on for the hotly anticipated Commonwealth Games in Glasgow from the 23 July - 2 August 2026.
data.seoDescription: The countdown begins for the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games. Plan a city break to Glasgow this summer and check out cool things to do including FAQ guidance.
data.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games

data.name: content

introduction.value:
For the first time since 1998, Scotland has qualified for the FIFA World Cup – and the whole country is brimming with excitement.

Running from 11 June - 19 July 2026, the tournament is taking place across three host countries: the United States, Mexico and Canada.

Join the Tartan Army and cheer on the team in their group stage matches on:

  • 14 June (Scotland vs Haiti) at 2 am GMT
  • 19 June (Scotland vs Morocco) at 11 pm GMT
  • 24 June (Scotland vs Brazil) at 11 pm GMT

data.teaser: Cheer on Scotland at the FIFA World Cup 2026 and find information about fan zones in Scotland, stadium tours and more.
data.seoDescription: Find information about how you can support Scotland qualifying for the FIFA World Cup 2026. Including fan zones, stadium tours, and the history of football.
data.title: FIFA World Cup 2026

data.name: content

introduction.value: Each year the Edinburgh Festivals bring a wave of colour and soaring excitement to the city. These festivals are renowned worldwide and see thousands of visitors and locals come together to enjoy a season of eclectic shows, performances and displays across Scotland's capital.

data.teaser: Discover Edinburgh's summer festivals, including the world-famous Edinburgh International Festival and Edinburgh Festival Fringe.
data.seoDescription: Find out about Edinburgh festivals and the Fringe. Including key dates, what the festivals are like, tips to make the most of your visit and more.
data.title: Edinburgh Festivals

data.name: content

categoryLinks.name: visitscotland:categoryLinks
categoryLinks.title: Plan your next Scottish event or holiday

copy.value: Find unmissable events throughout the calendar year.

introduction.value:
Events in Scotland have the power to amaze and inspire you. Our atmospheric crowds, iconic venues, and picture-perfect landscapes make Scotland the perfect country for hosting duties.  

From big sporting events, live music, and dance festivals to raising a toast to Scotland’s national icons, each season brings lots of exciting thrills to Scotland’s events and festivals scene. You can find events by type or suggested events in our calendar overview further down the page.

data.teaser: There's something happening in Scotland right now that the whole family will love.
data.seoDescription: Find amazing events and festivals in Scotland to choose from. Including our events calendar, immersive spectator sports, cultural events, and more.
data.title: Events and festivals in Scotland

data.name: content

introduction.value: What makes a summer holiday in Scotland so special? The lush green landscapes and long summer days, for starters – perfect for outdoor adventures or simply soaking up the views. Then there are all the wonderful things to do, from cheering on competitors at a traditional Highland games to exploring new destinations.

data.teaser: Find ideas and inspiration, from family days out to top camping spots, walks and outdoor activities.
data.seoDescription: Find inspiration for summer holidays & breaks in Scotland. Including accommodation, attractions, outdoor activities, events and festivals and more!
data.title: Summer holidays & breaks in Scotland

data.name: content

introduction.value: Scotland's islands each have their own unique character. Orkney and Shetland offer fascinating history and captivating culture; the Inner Hebrides together with the Isle of Skye boast striking landscapes and are a mecca for adventure seekers; while the Outer Hebrides with its unparalleled vistas have bagged the accolade by National Geographic of being one of the ‘Best of the World’ destinations for travellers in 2025. Where will you choose to explore? Discover amazing things to do, a fascinating culture and the perfect base for an incredible holiday in Scotland.

data.teaser: Find out about the hundreds of islands in Scotland including Arran, Lewis, Skye, Outer Hebrides and Shetland. Plan the perfect island getaway today.
data.seoTitle: Scotland Islands - Dream Holidays & Travel Tips
data.seoDescription: Find out more about the hundreds of islands in Scotland, including Arran, Lewis, Skye, the Outer Hebrides and Shetland. Plan the perfect island getaway today.
data.title: Scotland's islands

data.name: content

introduction.value: The Scottish music scene has an incredible vibe. Folk songs carried on sea breezes in island towns, spontaneous guitar players in local pubs, and festival crowds echoing across the fields on hot summer weekends. Find out what’s happening in Scotland this year, followed by a closer look at the traditions that have shaped our unmistakable sound.

data.teaser: Find out what’s happening in Scotland this year
data.seoDescription: See your favourite artists headlining at this year's lineup of Scottish music festivals. Including Shetland Folk Festival, TRNSMT, Celtic Connections, and more.
data.title: Scottish music festivals

data.name: content

introduction.value: Few places lend themselves to touring quite like Scotland, with its dramatic landscapes and rich heritage. Whether you’re drawn to luxury train journeys, breathtaking road trips or guided walking tours, there are so many ways to explore Scotland’s natural beauty in comfort and style. Take your time, soak up the landscapes and enjoy the very best of Scotland with these touring ideas.

data.teaser: Tour Scotland at your own pace with these fantastic ideas.
data.seoTitle: The Best Scotland Tours - Luxury & Scenic Tours
data.seoDescription: Discover the best tours of Scotland. Including luxury train journeys, scenic road trips and the best walking tours. Departing from all over Scotland.
data.title: The best tours of Scotland - luxury & scenic tours

data.name: content

introduction.value: You know the famous places already, but there is much more to discover in Scotland. Use our map of Scotland to explore different cities, towns and regions. It's time to uncover the hidden gems of Scotland, beyond the well-trodden paths. Every place holds a story waiting to be told...

data.teaser: Where to next? Explore our map of Scotland.
data.seoDescription: Plan your holiday with our map of Scotland. Explore different cities, towns, regions, islands, accommodation, food and drink, and much more.
data.title: Explore Scotland

data.name: content
highlights: Off-roading in Loch Lomond & The Trossachs National Park
Exploring the castle and gardens at Inveraray Castle
An unforgettable visit to Rosslyn Chapel
A luxury trip on the Royal Scotsman
Shopping at the Royal Family's silversmiths

introduction.value:
Scotland is the destination star of NBC's hit show Extra Mile Club, which sees luxury travel advisors from Global Travel Collection compete to create the best itinerary possible for their clients: ice skating Olympians Tara Lipinski and Johnny Weir! See what Tara and Johnny experienced in Scotland and read on to plan your own Scottish adventure.

Discover direct flights from the United States to Scotland

Watch the first episode of Extra Mile Club: Scotland

Watch the second episode of Extra Mile Club: Scotland

data.teaser: Have you been inspired by Tara & Johnny's Scotland itinerary as seen on NBC's Extra Mile Club? Read on and plan your own Scottish adventure.
data.seoDescription: Follow Olympic figure skating legends Tara Lipinski & Johnny Weir on a magnificent Scottish escape with NBC's Extra Mile Club and Global Travel Collection.
data.title: Tara & Johnny's luxury Scotland itinerary

data.name: content

introduction.value:
Follow in the footsteps of comedians Fatiha El-Ghorri and John Tothill on their unforgettable journey through Scotland on the Channel 4 series Where to next? Their trip was guided by tips from friendly locals that they met along the way, leading them to hidden gems and unique experiences during their journey through the southwest of Scotland. Read on and get inspired for your next Scottish adventure!

Watch the whole episode on YouTube

data.teaser: Follow in the footsteps of comedians Fatiha El-Ghorri and John Tothill on their unforgettable journey through Scotland.
data.seoTitle: Channel 4's Where to next? Scotland Itinerary
data.seoDescription: Follow in the footsteps of comedians Fatiha El-Ghorri and John Tothill with this itinerary of their unforgettable journey through Scotland.
data.title: Channel 4's Where to next? Scotland itinerary

data.name: content

introduction.value: A wee country with a big personality, Scotland has bucket-loads of experiences to offer when it comes to holidays – so how will you know where to start? Don’t fear – we’ve lined up an array of itineraries to help you get planning your ideal Scotland trip, be that a day in the capital, a week’s island-hopping, or a three-day tour of Highland castles.

data.teaser: Plan your days in Scotland with the help of our suggested itineraries.
data.seoDescription: Discover a range of themed Scotland trip itineraries. Including east coast, west coast, Harry Potter, Edinburgh, Glasgow, castles and history.
data.title: Scotland trip itineraries
